projects.title: ResAdapt: Adaptive Resolution for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning
projects.meta: Input-side budget allocation before visual encoding · CAPO · Video QA & grounding
projects.description: Learning how much visual budget each frame receives via a lightweight allocator paired with a frozen MLLM, improving efficiency-accuracy trade-offs under aggressive compression.

projects.title: Distill Yourself
projects.meta: Ongoing project · Claude Code & Codex histories
projects.description: A local-first system for indexing AI coding sessions, distilling durable user preferences and working patterns, and teaching future agent sessions through auditable memory.

projects.title: Awakening Augmented Generation (IAG)
projects.meta: COLING 2025 · NQ, TQA & WQ · T5 & Llama2
projects.description: Awakening latent knowledge in LLMs through explicit and implicit imagination modules without retrieval-heavy pipelines, evaluated on NQ, TQA, and WQ.

projects.title: TAGI: Task Adapters Generation from Instructions
projects.description: Generating task-specific adapters from instructions via hypernetworks and distillation, improving cross-task generalization with lower compute than instance-only training.

projects.title: DyPRAG: Dynamic Parametric Retrieval Augmented Generation
projects.description: Improving test-time knowledge enhancement by shifting part of retrieval augmentation into dynamic parametric memory rather than only longer retrieved contexts.

projects.title: LMTuner
projects.meta: Highly integrable LLM training framework · External homepage
projects.description: A user-friendly framework for fine-tuning large language models with more modular setup and lower engineering overhead.

projects.title: Awesome-LLM-Long-Context-Modeling
projects.meta: Curated long-context ecosystem resource · GitHub repository
projects.description: A widely used curated repository that tracks papers, benchmarks, systems, and tooling for long-context language modeling.
